issues.problem: Self-contradictory description: says 'not passed through to ETL_CardSnapshot' but then '(selected into temp table but present in final output)'. These statements conflict — writer must verify from SP code whether Address appears in the final ETL_CardSnapshot output.

Tagged Tier 3 but both are ETL-generated (GETDATE() and derived date respectively). These fit Tier 2 (ETL-computed) better than Tier 3 (no source traceable). Minor classification edge case given no upstream wiki exists.
Placeholder text 'No Atlassian sources searched (regen harness mode)' provides no value. Should either contain relevant links or a clean 'None identified' statement.
Footer claims 'Phases: 11/14' but no Phase Gate Checklist section exists to identify which 3 phases were skipped. Cannot verify data evidence claims without this.

Description hedges with 'May represent the source system creation time vs pipeline creation time'. Should commit to 'semantics vs @Created unclear, both carry identical values in sampled data' rather than speculating.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor improvements only (wiki passes): (1) Fix contradictory Address (#36) description — verify from SP code whether it reaches ETL_CardSnapshot final output. (2) Consider re-tagging SynapseUpdateDate and partition_date as Tier 2 (ETL-computed). (3) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section listing completed vs skipped phases. (4) Remove speculative hedging from Created (#67). (5) Clean up Section 8 placeholder.

table_level_stats_in_descriptions: CardStatusCode distributions (A=41%, E=29%, N=26%, S=2.6%, L=1%)
skipped_phases: Cannot determine — no Phase Gate Checklist section exists, footer only says 11/14
